subject: Fw: B727 Paint Scheme Design
body:
Boeing design, I have not looked at these yet, 
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "Craig Barnett, Scheme Designers, Inc." <craig@schemedesigners.com>

Date: Thu, 6 Mar 2008 12:51:30 
To:<LVJET@aol.com>
Subject: B727 Paint Scheme Design


Hi Larry:
 
 There are more renderings online at http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE <http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE> . 
  
If Jeffrey would like, we can also produce a rotatable 3-D electronic model and several static ¾ view high definition photo realistic renderings of the aircraft in his final scheme prior to completing the final specifications.  This service is an additional $1,000.00. 
  
Best regards, 
  
Craig Barnett, CEO
